results.title: The Persian Qanat — UNESCO World Heritage Centre
results.snippet: Source-domain: mother well + sloping infiltration gallery + regular ventilation shafts + mazhar exit; constructed by muqannis.
results.reason: Title contains 'Persian Qanat' and snippet contains 'mother well' and 'infiltration gallery' as substrings, yielding 3 keyword overlaps; pure source-domain description with no LLM mechanism.

results.title: Qanat — Wikipedia
results.snippet: Source-domain: kushkan tunnel gently sloping toward mazhar; vertical shafts at intervals for spoil removal.
results.reason: No exact content-word substrings appear ('Qanat' alone is not the bigram 'Persian qanat'); below all thresholds.

results.title: Qanat — World History Encyclopedia
results.snippet: Source-domain: 3000-year-old groundwater system; vertical shafts at intervals enable construction and maintenance.
results.reason: No exact content-word bigrams present; vertical shafts mentioned but not as 'ventilation shaft cascade'; below all thresholds.

results.title: IC-Cache: Efficient LLM Serving via In-context Caching (2025/1)
results.snippet: LLM-side: in-context caching layer for cross-request LLM serving.
results.reason: Cross-request in-context caching is a different granularity from periodic mid-stream shafts; no content-word substrings; all three signals below threshold.

results.title: Continuous Semantic Caching for Low-Cost LLM Serving (2026/4)
results.snippet: LLM-side: semantic-state cache with continuous gradient eviction.
results.reason: Continuous-eviction semantic cache is functionally close to periodic-shaft selection writing into a sparse cache; semantic cosine reaches 0.70 and judge score 0.74 both at/above 0.70 threshold.

results.title: From Prefix Cache to Fusion RAG Cache (2026/1)
results.snippet: LLM-side: cascade from prefix cache to fusion RAG cache hierarchy for inference acceleration.
results.reason: Explicit cache cascade hierarchy captures the cascaded-shaft gallery idea operationally; both judge (0.78) and semantic (0.74) above 0.70.

results.title: Cache-to-Cache: Direct Semantic Communication (2025/10)
results.snippet: LLM-side: KV-cache projection for inter-model semantic communication.
results.reason: Inter-model KV projection, not intra-context shaft cascade; all signals below threshold.

results.title: ContextCache: Context-Aware Semantic Cache (2025/6)
results.snippet: LLM-side: context-aware semantic cache for multi-turn dialogue.
results.reason: Multi-turn semantic cache at turn boundaries rather than periodic mid-context shafts; all three signals below 0.70.

fail_reason: Result 1 trips keyword overlap (3 content-words: 'Persian qanat', 'mother well', 'infiltration gallery'); results 5 and 6 trip both semantic-cosine and functional-equivalence thresholds (continuous semantic caching and prefix-to-fusion RAG cache cascade describe equivalent cache-write-selection and cascade-hierarchy effects).
